title: [FIRRTL] InferResets FullAsyncResetAnnotation produces invalid strictconnect
body:
Input (using firtool `CIRCT firtool-1.64.0g20240131_c811e2d`):
```firrtl
FIRRTL version 4.0.0
circuit Resets: %[[
{
  "class": "sifive.enterprise.firrtl.FullAsyncResetAnnotation",
  "target": "~Resets|Child>rf_reset"
},
{
  "class": "sifive.enterprise.firrtl.FullAsyncResetAnnotation",
  "target": "~Resets|ResetsC>r"
}
]]
  module Child:
    input rf_reset : Reset

  module Resets:
    input r : AsyncReset

    inst c of ResetsC
    connect c.r, r
    
    
  module ResetsC:
    input r : AsyncReset

    inst c of Child

    wire rr : Reset
    invalidate rr
    connect c.rf_reset, rr
```
(may not be quite minimal)


Produces bugged strictconnect:

```
resets.fir:25:5: error: 'firrtl.strictconnect' op failed to verify that operands must be structurally equivalent
    inst c of Child
    ^
resets.fir:25:5: note: see current operation: "firrtl.strictconnect"(%0, %arg0) : (!firrtl.uint<1>, !firrtl.asyncreset) -> ()
```

The operation is inserted here:

https://github.com/llvm/circt/blob/6212d2ed21c4e06a982d9a253a6b60d24efbaa7f/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Transforms/InferResets.cpp#L1795
